# Agent Prompts

This directory contains prompt templates used by the Cogni AI agents for specific tasks.

## Prompts

### Update Docs (`task-update-docs.prompt.md`)

This prompt is used by the `task-update-docs.yml` workflow to instruct the agent to review and update core architecture,
documentation, and constraint files for mutual consistency and accuracy.

### Repository Setup (`repository-setup.prompt.md`)

Full repository setup checklist using organization standards from `Cogni-AI-OU/.github`.
Used for reviewing and standardizing repository structure, configuration files, and development workflows.

## Catalog

See [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) for a technical catalog of available prompts.
